hooks.description: Run test suite after every code change

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,os; path=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH',''); blocked=['sffs_data/','security/','.env','.pem','.key']; [sys.exit(1) or print('BLOCKED: write to protected path: '+path) for p in blocked if p in path]"
